breakdown: This is a pure documentation/chore PR that mirrors existing git-header instructions into GEMINI.md. No code was modified, so all code quality dimensions are trivially satisfied. The documentation itself is clear with INSTRUCTION/CRITICAL RULE formatting, though minor improvements like consistent case (CRITICAL RULE line has extra space before the text) could enhance readability.
reasoning: As a documentation-only change, traditional code quality metrics don't apply meaningfully. The PR successfully adds procedural documentation for context verification with clear structure. Docked 15 points from documentation for the minor formatting inconsistency (inconsistent spacing on CRITICAL RULE line) which marginally reduces professional polish.
